prompt: Review the staged Terraform changes. This defines AWS infrastructure for a production analytics platform.
assertions: Review identifies the IAM policy with Action=* and Resource=* as a Critical security issue
Review flags the S3 bucket as publicly accessible (public access block all set to false, Principal=* in policy)
Review identifies the hardcoded database password in the aws_db_instance resource
Review flags the RDS instance as publicly accessible
Review notes that storage_encrypted is false on the database
Review flags the security group allowing ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 on port 5432
Review notes missing backup configuration (backup_retention_period = 0) or disabled deletion protection
Review applies infrastructure-specific security checks (least privilege, network exposure, secrets management)
